title: himantoglossum hircinum var. heldreichii
intro: Himantoglossum hircinum var. heldreichii, also known as the Heldreich's orchid, is a rare and endemic variety of the Himantoglossum hircinum orchid species, specifically found in Greece and Turkey. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Himantoglossum hircinum var. heldreichii include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
